printed.name: Single Leg Kick
printed.setup: Lying prone, trunk lifted, arms bent, elbows under shoulders, fingers interlaced, legs straight and together, lifted off Mat

movement.exhale: Bend leg (2 pulses), switch legs (2 pulses)
movement.inhale: Bend leg (2 pulses), switch legs (2 pulses)

cues: Keep both legs lifted off Mat
Press elbows into Mat to assist thoracic extension
